motto: A+Z.app makes you fly for LESS.

search.pick: Choose your cities from the suggestions.

result.cta_book: Book on this day to get the year-round lowest air ticket price
result.share_title: Tell a friend, save them money
result.no_live: No live check for this route — but you can still try

offline.title: You're offline
offline.message: Last cached results for your saved routes are below.

errors.no_data: No data available for this route yet.
errors.rate_limit: Too many searches. Try again in a moment.

hiw.title: How it works
hiw.concept: A+Z.app fulfils your flying needs. Set two cities — we find the lowest possible price and the best date to book. We do the heavy lifting so you fly {i}for{/i} {hl}LESS{/hl}.
hiw.foot: Your two cities are saved automatically — until you change them.

s2.head: Scan
s2.body: We sweep months of dates for the lowest fare.

s3.head: Book that flight
s3.body: Cheapest price + best day shown. 10-min timer before the price disappears.

billing.email_note: Your email is how you keep and restore your plan — use a real inbox you check.
billing.have_plan: You already have a {tier} plan — we've emailed your access link.
billing.check_inbox: Check your inbox for your access link.
billing.not_found: No active plan found for that email.
billing.cap_banner: Every feature is free for everyone until 1 January.
billing.free_upgrade: Free plan — upgrade for daily alerts
billing.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alerts.title: My alerts
alerts.empty: No alerts yet. Tap "Remind me" on a result to add one.
alerts.sent: Reminder ready in your mail app.
alerts.limit_free: Free keeps 1 saved route, locked. Upgrade to Pro to swap routes (3 changes) or Pro+ for unlimited.
alerts.limit_pro: Pro allows 3 route changes — you have used them all. Upgrade to Pro+ for unlimited routes and swaps.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.saved_intro: Save a route, then re-send a reminder to your own mail anytime.
profile.reward: When this hits 100%, every paid plan becomes free for everyone until January 1. So share more!
profile.karma_msg: The more you share AplusZ, the faster the whole site — including Pro and Pro+ — becomes free for everyone.
profile.streak: Day streak — open or share AplusZ daily to keep it alive.
